tagline: Now available as Databricks-hosted models for enhanced accessibility.
what_it_does: Databricks Model Serving now supports Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image and Gemini 3 Pro Image as Databricks-hosted models. Users can access these models through the Foundation Model APIs, enabling integration into various applications. This update enhances the range of available models for machine learning tasks within the Databricks environment.
why_it_matters: This release allows organizations to leverage advanced AI capabilities from Google Gemini models directly within Databricks, improving productivity and innovation in data-driven applications. It also simplifies compliance with model usage policies, ensuring that businesses can utilize these models responsibly and effectively.
plain_summary: Databricks Model Serving now supports Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image and Gemini 3 Pro Image as Databricks hosted models. Users can access these models through the Foundation Model APIs, enabling integration into various applications.

capabilities.title: Access to Gemini Models
capabilities.desc: Users can now utilize Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image and Gemini 3 Pro Image as hosted models.

capabilities.title: Foundation Model APIs Integration
capabilities.desc: Seamless integration with Foundation Model APIs for easy access and deployment.

capabilities.title: Compliance Management
capabilities.desc: Customers are responsible for adhering to applicable model terms and usage policies.

capabilities.title: Enhanced Model Variety
capabilities.desc: Expands the selection of available models for diverse machine learning applications.

steps.title: Access Model Serving
steps.desc: Navigate to the Model Serving section in Databricks.

steps.title: Select Gemini Model
steps.desc: Choose either the Gemini 3.1 Flash Image or Gemini 3 Pro Image.

steps.title: Integrate with APIs
steps.desc: Utilize Foundation Model APIs to access the selected model.

steps.title: Ensure Compliance
steps.desc: Review and comply with the applicable terms and policies for model usage.

steps.title: Deploy in Applications
steps.desc: Integrate the model into your data applications for enhanced AI capabilities.

key_takeaway: Google Gemini 3.1 and Pro Images are now available as Databricks-hosted models, enhancing AI capabilities for users.
